summary: Completed iteration 9 testing for Expenses Register (Registro Uscite) and Auto-Reminder features. All backend APIs working correctly. All UI pages verified.

issues: Main client search dropdown doesn't show 'TEL MANCANTE' badge for clients without phone - only appears in appointment modal dropdown. This is a potential enhancement.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages load correctly and features work

seed_data_creation: None - used existing expenses: Affitto Locale (€800), Fornitore Colori (€320), Bolletta Luce (€180)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All expense features tested and working. Auto-reminder batch endpoints work but return empty pending list since no appointments for tomorrow. Clients page shows 'Telefono mancante!' badges correctly. Expenses page shows SCADUTA/IN SCADENZA badges correctly.

backend_apis.GET /api/expenses: PASS - Returns expenses list with filter support
backend_apis.POST /api/expenses: PASS - Creates expense with all fields (description, amount, category, due_date, is_recurring, recurrence, notes)
backend_apis.POST /api/expenses/{id}/pay: PASS - Marks as paid and creates next occurrence if recurring
backend_apis.GET /api/expenses/upcoming: PASS - Returns unpaid expenses with overdue flag
backend_apis.GET /api/reminders/auto-check: PASS - Returns is_reminder_time, pending list, totals
backend_apis.POST /api/reminders/batch-mark-sent: PASS - Marks multiple appointments as reminded

/uscite (Expenses Page).stats_cards: PASS - Shows Da Pagare, Scadute, Pagate
/uscite (Expenses Page).filter_buttons: PASS - Da Pagare, Pagate, Tutte filters work
/uscite (Expenses Page).expense_list: PASS - Shows expenses with SCADUTA/IN SCADENZA badges

Planning page.expenses_banner: PASS - Shows '1 scadenze SCADUTE! · 2 in scadenza (7 giorni) — Totale: €1300.00'

Clients page.phone_warning_badge: PASS - Shows 'Telefono mancante!' badge in red for clients without phone

Reminders page.batch_send_button: N/A - No pending appointments for tomorrow in test env
